# Task Brief Template

Use this for non-trivial work before implementation.

## Goal

What should change?

## Why

Why does it matter now?

## Context

Relevant files, modules, docs, tickets, previous examples, or reference implementations.

## Constraints

Architecture, product, compliance, performance, security, or style constraints.

## Done when

Observable completion criteria.

## Verification

Exact commands, scenarios, screenshots, or other evidence required before the work can be called done.

## Risks / open questions

What could go wrong or what still needs human judgment?
